name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Today, we're 50 days out from the election! That means we need to majorly ramp up our fundraising for the final stretch if we're going to compete with Gary Johnson and my other extreme opponent.

**With so little time left, the best way you can support my campaign and our work is to become a sustaining weekly donor through Election Day.** **_[Become a sustaining contributor (or make a one-time gift) here>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-weekly-2018?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Become+a+sustaining+contributor+or+make+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1")_**
**[BECOME A WEEKLY DONOR>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-weekly-2018?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+BECOME+A+WEEKLY+DONOR+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1")** **Read more about how sustaining contributors help below:**

* * *

As we enter the final seven weeks of my first re-election campaign, we cannot risk missing a beat or slowing down.

That's because **I am facing two extreme opponents, including Libertarian and former presidential candidate Gary Johnson, and every vote will matter this November.** Every dollar and cent we raise goes right into voter outreach and advertising, so knowing what we can budget each week is critical.
**[FIGHT BACK NOW](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-weekly-2018?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+FIGHT+BACK+NOW&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1")** That is why I am asking for your support today. By making a sustaining weekly gift through the election, my team and I will be able to count on you as we make our final budgets of the campaign.

**Even a few dollars each week can make a major difference this close to the election. That 's why I believe in grassroots supporters like you.**

**_[We did the math, and if 265 supporters make sustaining gifts before midnight tomorrow, we'll be able to finalize the next round of voter outreach and advertising plans. Please, contribute here to become a sustaining weekly donor for the last seven weeks of the campaign ->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-weekly-2018?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+We+did+the+math+and+if+265+supporters+ma&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1")_**

**[Give $10 weekly->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-weekly-2018?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Give+ask+weekly+rarr&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1")** **[Give $29 weekly->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-weekly-2018?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Give+ask+weekly+rarr&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1")** ****[Give $50 weekly->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-weekly-2018?amount=50&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+Give+ask+weekly+rarr&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1")**** **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-weekly-2018?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=8+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180917_1_1")** Together, I know we can defend my Senate seat.

Thank you,

Martin

name: Team O'Halleran
subject: 50 DAYS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
50 days is NOT much time to make sure we win this race.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633f29/1a8421e1/1a5f79751/491aecac/1398393935/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Friends, did you catch Tom's note below? Because if you didn't -- there are only 50 DAYS left until Election Day! Like Tom said in his note, 50 days is NOT much time to make sure we win this race -- so we won't take more of your time. [**Please, consider making a donation today, because we really need your support to keep firing on all cylinders, all the way until Election Day!**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.17_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Team O'Halleran \-----forwarded message----- From: Tom O'Halleran Subject: just 50 days Friends, _There are only 50 days to go until Election Day._ That's 50 days to knock doors and make phone calls. That's 50 days to share the truth about my record of standing up for Arizona in Congress with all the voters in our district. That's 50 days to counter attacks from the far-right and from my opponent. **That 's 50 days to keep AZ-01 blue and win the House majority for Democrats. ** [**That 's not much time, friend, so can I count on you to make a donation to my campaign today, so we can finish these last 50 days strong?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.17_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$10](http://action.tomohalleran. ---|---|---
[$100](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.17_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$250](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.17_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=250&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [Other](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.17_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

These next 50 days will make or break this race, Friends -- so your support right now really is critical. This is a perennial battleground district, and the Republicans and their far-right Super PACs are determined to flip it red so they can save their majority. If we let our momentum slow, even for a moment, we might not be able to regain it, and they will win.

I'm the most vulnerable Democrat in the House and maintaining control of this seat is crucial to our chance of taking back Congress. [**So please, if you can, support my campaign with a donation today -- every dollar will go toward our efforts to end these last 50 days strong.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.17_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Yours,

Tom

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.17_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonans. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633f29/1a8421e1/1a5f79751/491aec97/1398393935/VEsHAA/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe").

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: Add your name: Tell Congress to protect Mueller from Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schiff for Congress
body:
Activist -

Last week, Fox News host and one of President Trump's closest confidants, Sean Hannity, made a troubling prediction: **Trump will fire Special Counsel Robert Mueller any day now.**

Whether or not Hannity's prediction comes true, one thing is certain: the fact that one of the President's top confidantes and mouthpieces is publicly advocating such a reckless action is a massive warning sign about the danger to our democracy.

[**It 's beyond time Congress take action to hold this President accountable to the rule of law, before it's too late. Will you add your name and urge Congress to pass legislation to protect Robert Mueller now?**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BQeor/6/pW/r5cs/6fsNc3/sfxrdEls21/P/P)

Let's not forget that President Trump's campaign manager, Paul Manafort, was found guilty on 8 counts of tax evasion and bank fraud. Last week, Manafort pled guilty to different charges, and agreed to cooperate with the Special Counsel. And last month, Trump's personal lawyer and former "fixer," Michael Cohen, pleaded guilty to campaign finance violations, tax fraud, and bank fraud charges, while saying in court that he broke the campaign finance laws at the direction of Donald Trump.

**So, at this point, here 's what we know:**

Trump campaign chairman: Guilty
Trump personal attorney: Guilty
Trump deputy campaign chairman: Guilty
Trump National Security Advisor: Guilty
Trump foreign policy advisor: Guilty

Some witch hunt, huh?

Despite numerous guilty verdicts from his inner circle, President Trump continues to attack the Special Counsel's investigation and has even claimed that he is "totally allowed" to be involved in this investigation and could even "run it" if he wanted. He has also stepped up his attacks on the Attorney General and hopes to replace him with someone who will end the Mueller probe.

**That should set off a whole new set of alarms. This President thinks he is above the law and should be his own prosecutor, judge, and jury.** We need to take a stand and demand Congress do everything in its power to protect Special Counsel Robert Mueller now, before it's too late.

[**Add your name right now to join me in calling on members of Congress to pass bipartisan legislation to protect the Special Counsel from President Trump.**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BQeor/s/pW/r5cs/6fsNc3/z9gdBXAKUF/P/P)

Thank you for fighting alongside me,

Adam Schiff
| Paid for by Schiff for Congress
---

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](https://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvNDE5LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMjQzODUwODQ0)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

Peter,

**Today I will travel to Prairie View A &M University **for a forum sponsored by the student government and multiple campus organizations. I am honored to have an opportunity to engage with voters at this most historic public institution.

**Prairie View A &M is a 140 year-old historically-black university that has been at the center of some of the most important struggles for civil rights in Texas.** Understanding the importance of this campus community to our district, we have hired two student organizers to support voter registration and outreach on campus. **[Donate today to registrer voters and boost student engagement at Prairie View A&M](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2227458/11718639/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzMzMGI0Yy0zZWJiLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-gW8BOP525AqGXZEJdL2ZIYU3m78PM2_HPppgQURssE=)**.
_ (left: Mike with campaign organizers Larry Allen (l) and Cameron Jackson (r); right: registering student voters on campus)_

**Repeatedly, throughout the last forty years,[Prairie View students have been forced to fight for their right to vote](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2227459/11718640/-371025074?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzMzMGI0Yy0zZWJiLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-gW8BOP525AqGXZEJdL2ZIYU3m78PM2_HPppgQURssE=)**. Public officials have suppressed the vote by declaring that students are not "residents" and thus cannot register, closing early voting locations on campus, and even by preventing the U.S. Postal Service from delivering mail on campus, thus creating another barrier to student voter registration. In response, students have resisted in powerful fashion, marching 1000s strong to the polls and filing successful lawsuits that established voting rights for college students across the country.

**We know that outreach to young voters is critical to the success of my campaign, and to every campaign up and down the ballot.** Not only are we fighting to win control of Congress in 2019, but we are working to strengthen democratic participation for years to come. [**Please donate today so that we can continue this essential work**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2227460/11718641/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzMzMGI0Yy0zZWJiLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-gW8BOP525AqGXZEJdL2ZIYU3m78PM2_HPppgQURssE=). If you are in the area tomorrow, please come to [our event on campus](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2227461/11718642/1500666996?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzMzMGI0Yy0zZWJiLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-gW8BOP525AqGXZEJdL2ZIYU3m78PM2_HPppgQURssE=). And either way, thank you for your continued participation and support. With respect,
Mike

# _President Trump's Latest China Tariffs Are the Right Thing to Do_
”The fundamental problem facing the global trading system today is that since the turn of the century China has behaved like an outlaw at the center of world commerce,” Gordon Chang writes. “China has, through theft and forced taking, grabbed U.S. intellectual property worth _hundreds of billions of dollars_ each year. This has, with justification, been called the biggest theft in history.” The bottom line? “President Trump can’t arrest Chinese officials for theft, but he can impose tariffs to deter further crime,” Chang says. **[Click here to continue reading.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE4Ljk1MDMxNDAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOC45NTAzMTQwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3NTU1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&http://www.foxnews.com/opinion/2018/09/17/gordon-chang-trumps-latest-china-tariffs-are-right-thing-to-do.html) ** President Trump recognized the contributions of “Latino entrepreneurs to the United States during a White House event for the Hispanic Heritage Month celebration,” [**_The Associated Press_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE4Ljk1MDMxNDAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOC45NTAzMTQwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3NTU1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://apnews.com/fd06a1b7bce2416c995bbcc0f525287e/Trump-honors-contributions-of-Latino-entrepreneurs) reports. “America is winning again and Hispanic-owned businesses are leading the way," the President said yesterday during the event. **[More: Watch President Trump honor Hispanic business leaders.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE4Ljk1MDMxNDAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOC45NTAzMTQwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3NTU1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1041844539743498240) ** “A record-low 12% of Americans currently cite some aspect of the economy as the most important problem facing the U.S., down from 17% last month and one percentage point below the previous low of 13% recorded in May 1999,” Frank Newport writes for [_**Gallup**_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE4Ljk1MDMxNDAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOC45NTAzMTQwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3NTU1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://news.gallup.com/poll/242189/record-low-cite-economic-issues-top-problem.aspx). In [**_The Huffington Post_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE4Ljk1MDMxNDAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOC45NTAzMTQwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3NTU1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.huffingtonpost.com/entry/washington-post-trump-passport-crackdown_us_5b9ec246e4b046313fbc2bd1), Roque Planas writes that The Washington Post unethically distorted key facts when they alleged that the Trump Administration is systematically denying passports to Latinos along the border. Planas explains that “the Post’s report remains misleading. It relies on anecdotal evidence to make an explosive claim that’s contradicted by official data ― and doesn’t make that fact clear. It implies that years-old practices are new. And the paper consistently refused to correct the record unless it was called out by other reporters.” “The Senate overwhelmingly passed a bill on Monday that would prohibit a controversial practice through which insurers and drug middlemen prevent consumers from paying less at the pharmacy counter on prescription drugs,” Robert King reports in the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE4Ljk1MDMxNDAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOC45NTAzMTQwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3NTU1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/policy/healthcare/senate-advances-bill-to-end-pharmacy-gag-clauses). “Americans deserve to know the lowest drug price at their pharmacy, but ‘gag clauses’ prevent your pharmacist from telling you! I support legislation that will remove gag clauses and urge the Senate to act,” President Trump tweeted yesterday.
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE4Ljk1MDMxNDAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOC45NTAzMTQwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3NTU1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE4Ljk1MDMxNDAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOC45NTAzMTQwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3NTU1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE4Ljk1MDMxNDAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOC45NTAzMTQwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3NTU1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)
The White House · 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, NW · Washington DC 20500 · 202-456-1111

body:

name: Josh Hawley
subject: President Trump will ask me about this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE
body:
He's going to ask how fundraising is going. Hello Peter,

This Friday, President Trump is coming to Missouri for a rally. I can count on one thing for sure — [_**he's going to ask how fundraising is going.** _](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=f6133dffae374137840d412c76754fd5&_e=o491jP1hiCb515lJlgeeZvvbkhQ8WBjFUmfiAUWRyzrU5_HgnqSJLkMTTKoq7fCxgI6TyPzY552_5etTHihruR1dvap7q8hVBeSwYBIy_Ubrmbi_LO-FoluhukQ5_2R2UTOKo9hN_ptbKbnKchN4G-7e5zZURgED7G073pj-qdyINszgq4KA6X1TzsxoUuYOXla_2UV0HcfGwQa4Fpy_7etVN7Mv8Dp3N9LeCBpkx-nuaCWGvYs-a3fd3Refd7UhBtsM31j4K6pLfxh82sDYi55S_7tnx9FxI2PtPeApj4fnpdv_ouSvJnhDBmNzlMkZTjg5tcMzZaulz15fMQMM4n5D_NAtGCoyCNhodFIRuNHtrQ_6Pq1ZGcVRA3Gs7uslD5WMJ9wEuU4UugqSrDcCVw%3D%3D)

Ever since President Trump put his support behind our campaign, I've been working hard to make sure folks know that he's with us and counting on us to win here in Missouri. My opponent, Senator McCaskill, does everything she can to block our president's policies and his judicial nominees. She also spends a lot of time fundraising from millionaires on the East and West coasts. Claire McCaskill has chosen liberal party leaders over her own state time and again. It's time to retire her from the Senate and elect a Senator who fights for our values.

That's why President Trump endorsed me, and it's why he's taking the time to come to our state. [Will you support our campaign with a donation so I can give him the good news that we're closing the fundraising gap?](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=f6133dffae374137840d412c76754fd5&_e=o491jP1hiCb515lJlgeeZvvbkhQ8WBjFUmfiAUWRyzrU5_HgnqSJLkMTTKoq7fCxgI6TyPzY552_5etTHihruR1dvap7q8hVBeSwYBIy_Ubrmbi_LO-FoluhukQ5_2R2UTOKo9hN_ptbKbnKchN4G-7e5zZURgED7G073pj-qdyINszgq4KA6X1TzsxoUuYOFH7OWDgyhcRJHKaq_qkrDag9UlcCjPSVGaKY3NoVEF1Sv3oNnFOwVOOoDJwWw5jMcOjggKhldnhEQML32gDoNhmAZnew2gLXQS-nBaZhg453BvxFhXACFhmLkItgXttxWsxWkCuzbstmcg1t4sfb6mhxtgzjObP2PBeeWKW8-e7YWtkuMpSMbfZese-GCRL9nwM9d50THH6hqUF14JPV_Q%3D%3D)

name: Erica Bernstein
subject: It counts right now:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
What a grassroots campaign looks like.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3784c1/7ab0e2c4/7e2369bb/3498f272/707944395/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-ads-launch?refcode=OHQ09188A") Friend, I've long said we will never match Larry Hogan's campaign war chest -- but we need the funds to fight. And right now, if I'm being honest, that has never been more clear. We're down to the wire with less than two months before Election Day, and we just put out our first TV ad. Larry Hogan's been up with deceitful TV ads for more than a month, and he's still got millions to spend to keep them up. **We're a campaign powered by grassroots donors, not corporate ones -- and we're counting on you.** [**Donate $5 or more now to help us meet our $30,000 fundraising goal to keep our first TV ad on the air.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3784c1/7ab0e2c4/7e2369bb/3498f272/707944395/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-ads-launch?refcode=OHQ09188A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | **[**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3784c1/7ab0e2c4/7e2369bb/3498f27d/707944395/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-ads-launch?refcode=OHQ09188A&amount=5&express_lane=true")**

I'm a numbers person -- I mean, that's literally my job -- so seeing that Larry Hogan has already spent $1 million on ads, plus another couple hundred thousand dollars worth of help from the Republican Governors Association, is pretty scary.
But you know who helps put things into perspective? Ben.
Ben doesn't back down, and he never gives up. He wakes up every day not only excited to meet folks and talk about the issues that matter to them, but he gets up determined to make each day count. He knows the power of grassroots organizing, and he knows that it's not millions of dollars that wins elections -- it's folks like you, pitching in when you can, how you can.
[**So I'm hoping you'll pitch in now, when it really counts: Donate $5 or more now to show the power of grassroots donors against Larry Hogan's corporate-backed campaign, and keep our TV ad on the air.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3784c1/7ab0e2c4/7e2369bb/3498f272/707944395/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-ads-launch?refcode=OHQ09188A")
Thanks,
Erica
Erica Bernstein
Finance Director
Ben Jealous for Governor

clean_body: What a grassroots campaign looks like. | "" Friend, I've long said we will never match Larry Hogan's campaign war chest -- but we need the funds to fight. And right now, if I'm being honest, that has never been more clear. We're down to the wire with less than two months before Election Day, and we just put out our first TV ad. Larry Hogan's been up with deceitful TV ads for more than a month, and he's still got millions to spend to keep them up. We're a campaign powered by grassroots donors, not corporate ones -- and we're counting on you. "" Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" I'm a numbers person -- I mean, that's literally my job -- so seeing that Larry Hogan has already spent $1 million on ads, plus another couple hundred thousand dollars worth of help from the Republican Governors Association, is pretty scary. But you know who helps put things into perspective? Ben. Ben doesn't back down, and he never gives up. He wakes up every day not only excited to meet folks and talk about the issues that matter to them, but he gets up determined to make each day count. He knows the power of grassroots organizing, and he knows that it's not millions of dollars that wins elections -- it's folks like you, pitching in when you can, how you can. "" Thanks, Erica Erica Bernstein Finance Director Ben Jealous for Governor "" * PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER

name: Keren Charles Dongo, TimKaine.com
subject: You received emails from Mark Warner, Ralph Northam, Tim Kaine, and Anne Holton
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
|

[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f119c/3e0906/73738221/3e360387/3655557217/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20180918_1_FR_KCD_everyone-LDND&source=20180918_1_FR_KCD_everyone-LDND")

| | Derek, a few people have been reaching out to you recently:
* **Mark Warner** emailed you because he knows what it's like for a race to come down to the wire on Election Day ... _even when polls were showing you with a huge lead._

* **Ralph Northam** emailed you to tell you that building the kind of program that has the power to elect Democrats all over Virginia _takes a whole lot of asking for money._

* **Tim Kaine** emailed to tell you that the only way to see tangible results for all people, _like giving 400,000 more people access to health care_ , is to build a broad, far-reaching campaign that elects all of our Virginia Democrats.

* And finally, **Anne Holton** emailed you to say that as a Virginian, she's concerned, _and you should be, too._

Derek, four different messages, but one common theme: To win in November and continue our forward progress for all Virginians, we need your help.

[**Let 's all pull together and make sure we hit this Tuesday goal. We have $16,100 left to raise to close the gap before tonight - but if everyone who can chip in today does, we know we can get there.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f119c/3e0906/73738221/3e360386/3655557217/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180918_1_FR_KCD_everyone-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Letrsquos+all+pull+together+and+make+sur&utm_campaign=20180918_1_FR_KCD_everyone-LDND&source=20180918_1_FR_KCD_everyone-LDND")

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I have to be honest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | I have to be honest. We've been really nervous over here at headquarters. President Trump wants me to lose my job. Outside groups want me to lose my job. They're on the air and campaigning in Ohio to defeat me. And it just might be working. **We 're seeing the closest polling of this race -- _my opponent and I are within just 4 points of each other._** Here is how we win: by working hard every single day. **And that includes you, Peter.[Click here to make a contribution to help us keep our ads on the air. Chipping in is easy to do and you can even do it from your mobile device.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fffd3/4462dc26/64b20bf3/201bbf3e/2712370811/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTE4bmQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180918nd?refcode=sbe180918nd_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fffd3/4462dc26/64b20bf3/201bbf3d/2712370811/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTE4bmQiLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180918nd?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180918nd_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fffd3/4462dc26/64b20bf3/201bbf3d/2712370811/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTE4bmQiLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180918nd?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180918nd_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fffd3/4462dc26/64b20bf3/201bbf3d/2712370811/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTE4bmQiLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180918nd?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180918nd_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fffd3/4462dc26/64b20bf3/201bbf3e/2712370811/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTE4bmQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180918nd?refcode=sbe180918nd_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** We're knocking on doors and making phone calls. We're doing all we can to get every Ohioan to the polls. We're constantly working, reworking, and re-reworking the TV and digital plans to help our campaign win on Election Day. But if we don't have the resources to support our plans, we have to stop everything. We have to cut field staff and paid communications. And the more we cut, the more we risk the other side's smears getting through. [**Right now, we 're at risk of having to take down our TV ads. They're a critical way to communicate to voters. Will you make a contribution to stop that from happening?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fffd3/4462dc26/64b20bf3/201bbf3e/2712370811/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTE4bmQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180918nd?refcode=sbe180918nd_m_other&refcode2=3268183") **In the homestretch of this campaign, I 'm asking you directly: [Will you make your first campaign contribution? It is critical we reach this FEC goal and I really need your help.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fffd3/4462dc26/64b20bf3/201bbf3e/2712370811/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTE4bmQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180918nd?refcode=sbe180918nd_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** There's no sleep around here until November. We can rest after Election Day. Right now, our focus needs to be on hitting the next goal, getting over the next hurdle, and winning this campaign. I wouldn't ask for your help if it weren't so important. Our strength comes from you, one $26 average online contribution at a time. [**Can you chip in now to help us reach our FEC goal and keep our ads on the air?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fffd3/4462dc26/64b20bf3/201bbf3e/2712370811/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTE4bmQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180918nd?refcode=sbe180918nd_m_other&refcode2=3268183") | | | [Donate](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fffd3/4462dc26/64b20bf3/201bbf3e/2712370811/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTE4bmQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180918nd?refcode=sbe180918nd_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
With gratitude,
Sherrod

name: Bob Casey
subject: critical deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e62e7/51dbcc2a/1c690d88/3ab3036/3517708389/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")

This is important, really, and time is running out. **Our match deadline is tomorrow, and we are still $11,400 short of our goal.**

Ever since I voted against the GOP's anti-middle-class tax scheme, Republicans have been coming after me _hard_. President Trump even traveled to Pennsylvania last month where he attacked me for supporting affordable health care, for seeing his corporate tax cut for what it really was and for refusing to support the most dangerous and divisive pieces of his agenda.

President Trump would like nothing more than to replace me with his hand-picked Senate candidate, Congressman Lou Barletta. Congressman Barletta already votes with the President 99% of the time, and he's made it clear that he's running to help the President, not working families here in Pennsylvania. If we lose this seat, Medicare, Medicaid, Social Security and affordable health care are all at risk. We can't let that happen, team.

With only 49 days to go, it has never been more important to make sure this campaign has the resources it needs to win. That means that today, we need every grassroots supporter to do whatever they can to push toward the finish line. **But we only have until tomorrow to have every gift doubled: will you donate $5 or more right now -- before the match expires -- to protect Pennsylvania's Democratic Senate seat?**

Here's the link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/MATCH](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180918_fr1_nd_v2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

I really appreciate you coming through at this critical time.

Bob

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180918_fr1_nd_v2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---

name: President Donald Trump
subject: Join me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
I've been to Wisconsin. You're real, hard-working Americans. I've seen it. In fact, I won Wisconsin pretty big in 2016 because you were upset that....

Friend,

Why do out-of-touch liberals like Tammy Baldwin get elected in states like Wisconsin?

I've been to Wisconsin. You're real, hard-working Americans. I've seen it. In fact, I won Wisconsin pretty big in 2016 because you were upset that Washington wasn’t working and couldn’t get anything done.

This year, you have the chance to stand up to the swamp and defeat Tammy Baldwin, who votes against our agenda at every turn - from middle-class tax cuts to nominating qualified justices to repealing Obamacare.

Wisconsin needs someone who will actually represent them in the U.S. Senate. It has to be someone up for a fight because the liberals in Washington are going to do everything they can to make sure Tammy Baldwin wins and their obstruction continues.

Let me tell you, Leah Vukmir is up for the fight. As a nurse who worked third shift and proud mom of a first lieutenant in the Army, she’s ready to take your Wisconsin values to DC.

[**That’s why I’m announcing my support for Leah Vukmir for Senate and asking you to join me by chipping in $25 today.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c8790cb516904b94be71d4fafa25f4a4&_e=D7jKGjH3bPbJqrIdL5azWXM8LI2_yqx94k81IXDg4tELzADE47xDy0qqnwSZJnnEXDM5Zv1LBc-_Ds3tn0l3WxF3m9dyEQugHoHWq-RaSbPu5JGRt9bXNvNkSJEvhTl1kxesKiHPM7OezUGqpj3vP1h7Ctwr7QlnxxGN6kTkRWjcBd1908kCzdZtfYw-NZU0aPxsGdSeI8WnMCRbnbOQ-t4l5QQj14VFxj9kzJCOPAl3H76iB4TNgEcXe87Do26sKqA_iszIx9PHOyqgW7sovCxbre2sK9D73Y9FJ557XTFFS6dU954_olaPPiRNI5VrzDjAMUMZbga0ENuVFjWeYkvdvtgzstjee1Y6iz3mme4MRXlKuhlL9tW6UCtt568BUIH5Oqoa9GsFgu5FfM6-NHvEJsHamLpAZSIlj5hb8eO08rRRGlHsi3nePLL-f0ll2QV4XqVseTt_Phy98OmPUA%3D%3D)

[JOIN ME TO SUPPORT LEAH VUKMIR NOW](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c8790cb516904b94be71d4fafa25f4a4&_e=D7jKGjH3bPbJqrIdL5azWXM8LI2_yqx94k81IXDg4tELzADE47xDy0qqnwSZJnnEuiNZbg00ZclO70YJUijuUSNU0Vya3AIp5hk1b5fY02budDo4oLQFxjzIz5PkOp2im2P_ma691arlu1bSo3OSC1ut5lGG6WZsh3zYvprg3RfgSOVxNsLMgXNlcOzt3pTlrf8S-KO-ipL_1K1CjSQZ6I3oGvq1h3JCqHVlHG3wYIhkQLQJd-I0fxhxWfjSoQTAZIt7WBcMVia-gBu28ztlt1HkNf5yIAYj26HcV15CXrJMosmtCZ899X4O7R9IpizfzDI9XmRBF3gwzDrnXLUhCmyX73kQxQO6gu9Zu4AvHreo6xiIeoc5jN4Yehx3VIIvyGzrEhEGbDMbI1pZKZBSc22brN1YLLmHfEu9Pld7R6C2tFENHBNcFkaryrK60_UF)
---

Friend, the liberal establishment is doing everything they can to silence you. They think they'll spend millions of dollars and you'll re-elect Tammy Baldwin so they can continue forcing their agenda on Wisconsin.

But YOU have just as much of a right to your beliefs. You have just as much of a right to elect the leaders YOU want, who will do good things for you and your family. And it’s time for the swamp to accept that.

Leah is a principled leader with strong grassroots support, and Friend, I know she can deliver on the promises of real change. We've seen her do it.

Leah's work has transformed Wisconsin when they said it couldn't be done. That's the kind of fight we need more of in Washington, to get moving on the America First agenda that we voted for.

There’s no question about it, Friend, we need Leah.

And you have the chance to help us all by chipping in $25 today: **[https://secure.anedot.com/leah/trump-endorsement/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c8790cb516904b94be71d4fafa25f4a4&_e=D7jKGjH3bPbJqrIdL5azWXM8LI2_yqx94k81IXDg4tELzADE47xDy0qqnwSZJnnEXDM5Zv1LBc-_Ds3tn0l3WxF3m9dyEQugHoHWq-RaSbPu5JGRt9bXNvNkSJEvhTl1kxesKiHPM7OezUGqpj3vP1h7Ctwr7QlnxxGN6kTkRWjcBd1908kCzdZtfYw-NZU0aPxsGdSeI8WnMCRbnbOQ-t4l5QQj14VFxj9kzJCOPAnvcDas6OoD3nr7qrXBo9C_5ez_jbXitr_SyIpntNEkCc4lvItRgcu3mw8Og-hBGiIvcq9-kYqDkKG1pLxbrmFPCLl1ATcTI9NvOfUuupHZVhUdH80tgFfWEflMHfFS_ifR0p56WwRVUw0OuuwmSU7SC2yZIODG6JgAnh__hepaIiYZQ25vqGZmjyiSwtxE04EKoGQqh0eOUmCkP5kJhqDADToLx7UAp0LM3VPmPpt3HA%3D%3D)**

Friend, I’ve said it before and I will say it again: Obstructionist Democrats like Tammy Baldwin want our agenda to fail. It’s a 24/7 barrage of fake news, flat-out lies and absolute revulsion for everything we stand for as a movement.

Liberal propaganda machines have used every possible tactic to slander, undermine and insult our movement as we fight to put AMERICA FIRST. And they'll be working hard to make sure Baldwin has a chance.

But with your help, they will fail.

clean_body: I've been to Wisconsin. You're real, hard-working Americans. I've seen it. In fact, I won Wisconsin pretty big in 2016 because you were upset that.... Friend, Why do out-of-touch liberals like Tammy Baldwin get elected in states like Wisconsin? I've been to Wisconsin. You're real, hard-working Americans. I've seen it. In fact, I won Wisconsin pretty big in 2016 because you were upset that Washington wasn’t working and couldn’t get anything done. This year, you have the chance to stand up to the swamp and defeat Tammy Baldwin, who votes against our agenda at every turn - from middle-class tax cuts to nominating qualified justices to repealing Obamacare. Wisconsin needs someone who will actually represent them in the U.S. Senate. It has to be someone up for a fight because the liberals in Washington are going to do everything they can to make sure Tammy Baldwin wins and their obstruction continues. Let me tell you, Leah Vukmir is up for the fight. As a nurse who worked third shift and proud mom of a first lieutenant in the Army, she’s ready to take your Wisconsin values to DC. Friend, the liberal establishment is doing everything they can to silence you. They think they'll spend millions of dollars and you'll re-elect Tammy Baldwin so they can continue forcing their agenda on Wisconsin. But YOU have just as much of a right to your beliefs. You have just as much of a right to elect the leaders YOU want, who will do good things for you and your family. And it’s time for the swamp to accept that. Leah is a principled leader with strong grassroots support, and Friend, I know she can deliver on the promises of real change. We've seen her do it. Leah's work has transformed Wisconsin when they said it couldn't be done. That's the kind of fight we need more of in Washington, to get moving on the America First agenda that we voted for. There’s no question about it, Friend, we need Leah. And you have the chance to help us all by chipping in $25 today: Friend, I’ve said it before and I will say it again: Obstructionist Democrats like Tammy Baldwin want our agenda to fail. It’s a 24/7 barrage of fake news, flat-out lies and absolute revulsion for everything we stand for as a movement. Liberal propaganda machines have used every possible tactic to slander, undermine and insult our movement as we fight to put AMERICA FIRST. And they'll be working hard to make sure Baldwin has a chance. But with your help, they will fail. With your help, Leah Vukmir will be the next Senator from Wisconsin. I know you have the courage to stand up. You've done it before. It’s time for you to do it again. Please take a minute to join me in supporting Leah Vukmir today: Together, we'll keep America great! Thank you, President Donald Trump P.S. Leah needs your help fending off attacks from obstructionist liberals. Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Team Sisolak
subject: Steve's plan for cannabis in Nevada
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/i5ogPFoCdwfGxP-HTW05_0FaJACFw8zGPNa05dSHXAs=/kSQF6PRJeVia6IVr4vemcdNJNYa8UqrgCGUlY_mYiz8=)
---
Dear Friend,

Steve is in favor of the responsible use of cannabis, and it's high time we bring this industry out of the shadows so that we can keep consumers safe and generate tax revenue for our schools.

That's what Steve talked about when he sat down with Bruce and Ben, the hosts of The Roll-Up, the podcast produced by Leafly, the largest cannabis website in the world.

**[Listen to Steve's discussion about how we can continue to improve Nevada's recreational cannabis industry.](https://act.myngp.com/el/i5ogPFoCdwfGxP-HTW05_0FaJACFw8zGPNa05dSHXAs=/Kszgqj9CTUGYGY-1Yt3stPhuOpiOKneP8G-VJ7gVgUc=)**

This is a states' rights issue. And, just like with casinos, Nevada has the ability and the experience to regulate cannabis so that it is safe and can generate revenue. But that means standing up to Trump's attorney general, who doesn't respect state cannabis laws -- something Adam Laxalt has repeatedly failed to do.

We'll be blunt -- life can really be improved for Nevadans if we get smart about cannabis. **[So please listen to Steve's discussion on The Roll-Up.](https://act.myngp.com/el/i5ogPFoCdwfGxP-HTW05_0FaJACFw8zGPNa05dSHXAs=/Kszgqj9CTUGYGY-1Yt3stPhuOpiOKneP8G-VJ7gVgUc=)**

Thanks,

Team Sisolak

P.S. -- this campaign is powered by small-dollar grassroots contributions. **[Please chip in $4.20 so we can keep Nevada moving forward.](https://act.myngp.com/el/i5ogPFoCdwfGxP-HTW05_0FaJACFw8zGPNa05dSHXAs=/SAhWmVCgLJXe-CoQhrfM6mYNttMpomw6SHDyvQknEgI=?gpsid=37_57_3668&refcode=em18_180918_rollup_L1_engg_gq_cust__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180918_rollup_L1_engg_gq_cust__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&amount=4.20)**

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Rep. Brat’s first attack ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Rather than denounce the irresponsible attacks his allies are spreading, Rep. Dave Brat has joined them with false claims of his own.
| | Peter, Earlier this month, I wrote you with the unfortunate but not unexpected news that Speaker Paul Ryan's Super PAC had launched its first negative television advertisement against me. The response from this community of supporters was overwhelming. You rallied and provided this campaign with the resources to respond. Your support allowed us to set the record straight with our own message, and we have. I write you today because, rather than denounce the irresponsible attacks his allies are spreading, **Rep. Dave Brat has joined them with false claims of his own.** He is now up on television with an ad that makes both misleading and false statements about my positions on the issues -- an attempt to distract voters from his own extreme voting record. Peter, [**your support**](https://act.myngp.com/el/vtunJbMQfChKxcXURfkZjgtEBWAv8zzT7TsWUTFLSDc=/lCE93SQk7cFehjKrnyKgJdYFBuFEPmDL1fCpfDG9U1c=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.18_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) has been critical in moving our campaign forward in the face of these attacks. [**Will you make a contribution to my campaign today, so that we can continue to set the record straight, and then keep talking to voters about the real issues at stake in this race?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/vtunJbMQfChKxcXURfkZjgtEBWAv8zzT7TsWUTFLSDc=/lCE93SQk7cFehjKrnyKgJdYFBuFEPmDL1fCpfDG9U1c=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.18_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thank you, \- Abigail \-----forwarded message----- From: Abigail Spanberger Sent: Sep 6, 2018, 5:31 PM Subject: today, we crossed the attack ad threshold Friends, When we told our children I was running for Congress, my daughter's very first question was, "Will people say mean things about Mommy?" In response, my husband looked at her straight in the eyes and said, "Yes, but if they do, it's because Mommy's doing a good job." That's a hard conversation to have with your children, but the reality is, he's right. Despite all the other measures of our success -- our volunteers, events, ratings changes, and fundraising -- today is the day that we officially crossed the attack ad threshold. **Speaker Paul Ryan 's Super PAC, the Congressional Leadership Fund, put an ad up on television today, attacking my integrity and my commitment to keeping this country safe.** Desperation breeds desperate attacks, so we know they take me seriously as a threat, and we will counteract them with our own positive message. [**Please, will you contribute to my campaign today, to ensure that we can continue to share my story -- who I am and what I am working for -- with voters across VA-7?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/vtunJbMQfChKxcXURfkZjgtEBWAv8zzT7TsWUTFLSDc=/lCE93SQk7cFehjKrnyKgJdYFBuFEPmDL1fCpfDG9U1c=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.18_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) I know that voters in our community are tired of the kind of misleading, negative advertisements that characterize our politics today. And I believe that they will see past them and find, in our campaign, a refreshing, positive alternative to this unfortunate status quo. Thank you, friends, for [**your continued support.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/vtunJbMQfChKxcXURfkZjgtEBWAv8zzT7TsWUTFLSDc=/lCE93SQk7cFehjKrnyKgJdYFBuFEPmDL1fCpfDG9U1c=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.18_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Here's to electing leaders to Washington who are committed to elevating our political discourse, and making service -- not smear attacks -- the key measure of success. Thanks, \- Abigail [](https://act.myngp.com/el/vtunJbMQfChKxcXURfkZjgtEBWAv8zzT7TsWUTFLSDc=/lCE93SQk7cFehjKrnyKgJdYFBuFEPmDL1fCpfDG9U1c=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.18_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/vtunJbMQfChKxcXURfkZjgtEBWAv8zzT7TsWUTFLSDc=/lCE93SQk7cFehjKrnyKgJdYFBuFEPmDL1fCpfDG9U1c=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/vtunJbMQfChKxcXURfkZjgtEBWAv8zzT7TsWUTFLSDc=/uT4nD9YcPhI666yGcF9e2E149UA-ns36aQ_9H0vGl9I=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/vtunJbMQfChKxcXURfkZjgtEBWAv8zzT7TsWUTFLSDc=/6O_R3sCKA7PiCTidJE4n9EW0Z4Mp0LQGT6xtgBQ8DXQ=).

name: Bob Corney, Bredesen for Senate
subject: Changing her story to get elected
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bredesen for Senate
body:
|
#
Peter -- During debates on health care over the last few years, our opponent -- Congresswoman Marsha Blackburn -- has routinely referenced Tennessee’s experience with TennCare and Phil Bredesen’s leadership fixing it as governor. But now, in typical Washington fashion, Blackburn is talking out of both sides of her mouth -- she’s gone into the old Washington playbook of trying to turn Governor Bredesen’s record into a negative attack, despite her past statements. We can’t afford to sit back and let her campaign and the Washington swamp get away with these false attacks against Phil Bredesen and his record. We need to set the record straight. **That’s why we’re launching a digital ad highlighting Blackburn’s comments over the years -- I want you to be among the first to see it, and I hope I can count on you to pitch in $10 or whatever you can to help us keep this up in front of voters:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Chip in $10 Now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2235856/11779197/-1407256958?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mjg3ZjhhNi04N2JiLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=id48OHDeELJ9E6-NqXo2FRKRoDVsx0FdGLxPJ7GyRWU=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em180918-tenncare-express-tag&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)
---

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2235857/11779198/-1407256958?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mjg3ZjhhNi04N2JiLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=id48OHDeELJ9E6-NqXo2FRKRoDVsx0FdGLxPJ7GyRWU=&refcode=em180918-tenncare-thumb&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10)
As Congresswoman Blackburn has noted time and time again, Governor Bredesen took the necessary steps to keep TennCare from bankrupting the state while protecting coverage for the most vulnerable.
He worked on a bipartisan basis with the legislature to attack waste, fraud, and abuse. And throughout the process, Governor Bredesen protected coverage for children.
That’s the kind of common sense leadership that Tennesseans want out of their next U.S. Senator. And that’s why Governor Bredesen is applying for the job.
We need to keep putting this message in front of voters to fight back against the Washington swamp’s false attacks -- that’s why I have to ask:
**Can you chip in $10 today so we get the resources we’ll need? With new attacks flooding in from our opponent and out-of-state dark money groups, your support is more critical than ever.**

clean_body: | Peter -- During debates on health care over the last few years, our opponent -- Congresswoman Marsha Blackburn -- has routinely referenced Tennessee’s experience with TennCare and Phil Bredesen’s leadership fixing it as governor. But now, in typical Washington fashion, Blackburn is talking out of both sides of her mouth -- she’s gone into the old Washington playbook of trying to turn Governor Bredesen’s record into a negative attack, despite her past statements. We can’t afford to sit back and let her campaign and the Washington swamp get away with these false attacks against Phil Bredesen and his record. We need to set the record straight. That’s why we’re launching a digital ad highlighting Blackburn’s comments over the years -- I want you to be among the first to see it, and I hope I can count on you to pitch in $10 or whatever you can to help us keep this up in front of voters: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = As Congresswoman Blackburn has noted time and time again, Governor Bredesen took the necessary steps to keep TennCare from bankrupting the state while protecting coverage for the most vulnerable. He worked on a bipartisan basis with the legislature to attack waste, fraud, and abuse. And throughout the process, Governor Bredesen protected coverage for children. That’s the kind of common sense leadership that Tennesseans want out of their next U.S. Senator. And that’s why Governor Bredesen is applying for the job. We need to keep putting this message in front of voters to fight back against the Washington swamp’s false attacks -- that’s why I have to ask: Can you chip in $10 today so we get the resources we’ll need? With new attacks flooding in from our opponent and out-of-state dark money groups, your support is more critical than ever. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = The only way we’re going to be able to keep up with that is if we have enough grassroots support to push back against the Washington lies and to keep this race focused on getting things done for Tennesseans. Thanks for helping us tune out the partisan noise, Bob Corney Campaign Manager Bredesen for Senate Paid for by Bredesen for Senate Bredesen for Senate P.O. Box 92010 Nashville, TN 37209 United States

body:

name: Michael Moore
subject: I want to say this before my movie Fahrenheit 11/9 premieres
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
I ask one simple question in my new film: how the hell did we let this happen and what the hell do we do now?
#
Friends,
I ask one simple question in my new film: how the hell did we let this happen and **what the hell do we do now?**
This Friday, September 21, when _" Fahrenheit 11/9"_ hits theater screens all across America, you'll see that I pull no punches while exploring these questions.
That's because we are in a state of emergency.
Democracy is not a guarantee. Freedom is not inevitable. All of the myths and heroic tales we've told ourselves about America have been exposed. The mask has been removed. And in the battle for the future of America, there is no guarantee of victory.
**Hope, alone will not save us. In order to prevail, we need action.**
Our Revolution has spent the last two years committed to direct action. They are building a revolution to take on President Donald Trump and the sick system that gave us him in the first place. **Here's how:**
1. Creating grassroots political power with hundreds of thousands of members across the country and around the world.
2. Organizing to vote out the political establishment and vote in the next generation of progressive leaders.
3. Fighting for policies the majority of Americans support but are told over and over again are unrealistic - issues like Medicare for All, tuition-free public college, and getting big money out of politics.

The hard truth is that if we don't act now, we'll all be screwed. The President of the United States has no respect for the rule of law, the Constitution or even the concept of democracy itself. But neither do the corporations that are spending millions of dollars to give themselves and their rich friends trillion-dollar tax cuts. Our water, air, land - and our democracy - are being auctioned off to the highest bidder. Powerful special interest lobbies push their profit-driven agendas through every level of government.
Grassroots political power is the only way forward. From Kansas to Missouri, New York to Florida, the revolution is growing - and it is not coming from the Democratic Party or from the liberal establishment. The revolution is coming from the people.
[**Can you help Our Revolution build this movement in our communities? Donate $5 today to build on their organizing efforts for progressive change.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a90f/bed43eb/743ae4f5/75fcbe13/3722302113/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moore-film?refcode=em180918&noskip=true")
_" Fahrenheit 11/9"_ opens all across America on September 21. When you watch it, I hope it compels you to act. Working together, we could have a political revolution on our hands.
In solidarity,
Michael Moore
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a90f/bed43eb/743ae4f5/75fcbe13/3722302113/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moore-film?refcode=em180918&noskip=true")**
P.S. On Wednesday, September 19, join me, Our Revolution and a host of other great organizations for the "People's Premiere." [**Over 100 theaters**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a90f/bed43eb/743ae4f5/75fcbe12/3722302113/VEsF/ "https://gathrfilms.us/fahrenheit/#screening") across the U.S. have signed up for a special sneak peek of the film 2 nights before it becomes available nationwide. Afterward at 9:45 PM PT/12:45 AM ET, I will do a livestream Q&A to discuss the film, where we go from here and the march towards November 6!
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a90f/bed43eb/743ae4f5/75fcbe1d/3722302113/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a90f/bed43eb/743ae4f5/75fcbe1c/3722302113/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a90f/bed43eb/743ae4f5/75fcbe1f/3722302113/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a90f/bed43eb/743ae4f5/75fcbe1e/3722302113/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

body:
Hi Peter -- Did you see Dan's note about his support of Kyrsten Sinema in one of the most competitive races in the country?

[**Contribute today to help elect Kyrsten to the Senate, and read below to see why Dan supports her ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hzdoEZdnhF4DDOCepuqmX4RQ-eugRkkF_HmrecHR6Q0=/B2xMX70kF2C7ow3d0r23eBKDIqhaJhBBVwi25ltEO5U=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_180918_1_2&amount=15&recurring=1&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

**Begin forwarded message:**

>
> Hi Peter,
>

name: Gabe Amo
subject: a tossup?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
|
---
[ ](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a011/5e076a9e/54e1ffca/144259d6/3581086764/VEsH/ "http://ginaraimondo.com")

| | Hi friend, **Governing Magazine has moved the race for Rhode Island Governor to a "tossup." ** **Gina has brought change to the way Rhode Island does business** , and we can all see what that's done: more people working in Rhode Island than any time in the last decade, and the lowest unemployment rate in nearly 20 years. **But Allan Fung has committed to reversing those policies, which will put Rhode Islanders livelihoods at risk.** Is that the kind of thing you want to leave as a "tossup?" **[Donate $19 right now to help ensure Rhode Island keeps moving forward.](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a011/5e076a9e/54e1ffca/144259c9/3581086764/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/contrast-raimondo-fung?refcode=180918")** Days after the tragedy at Parkland, Gina signed an Executive Order to keep guns away from people displaying warning signs of violent behavior. At the same time, Allan Fung came out against any safeguards on semi-automatic weapons. **Is keeping Rhode Islanders safe from gun violence the kind of thing we want to leave to chance?** **[Click here and contribute $19 right now!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a011/5e076a9e/54e1ffca/144259c9/3581086764/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/contrast-raimondo-fung?refcode=180918")** When Donald Trump tried to open up Rhode Island to offshore drilling, Gina took decisive action to fight it, while Allan Fung stayed conspicuously silent. **Gina will stand up to the Trump Administration for Rhode Islanders, unlike Allan Fung.** **[Will you help her protect Rhode Island by donating $19 now?](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a011/5e076a9e/54e1ffca/144259c9/3581086764/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/contrast-raimondo-fung?refcode=180918")** We all need to do everything we can to stand up for our beliefs, our communities, and our state. **The future of Rhode Island is at stake, and it 's far too important to leave to a tossup.** Gabe Gabe Amo
Senior Advisor
---
|
---
[](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a011/5e076a9e/54e1ffca/144259c8/3581086764/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/gina.raimondo/") [](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a011/5e076a9e/54e1ffca/144259cb/3581086764/VEsA/ "http://twitter.com/ginaraimondo") [](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a011/5e076a9e/54e1ffca/144259ca/3581086764/VEsB/ "http://instagram.com/ginaraimondo")

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: A ‘new direction’ against biological threats
body:
| |
---
The White House • September 18, 2018
## A ‘new direction’ against biological threats
##
##
##
**Today marks the 17th anniversary** of the infamous “anthrax letters,” distributed beginning one week after the September 11 attacks of 2001. “Thought to be an indication of possible further terrorist activity,” National Security Advisor John Bolton says, these letters brought to Americans’ attention—many for the first time—the very real threat of bioweapons in the hands of our enemies. **America cannot afford to take chances.** Under President Donald J. Trump, it won’t. Today, the President signed off on a first-of-its-kind National Biodefense Strategy, one that signals “a new direction” in our approach to biological threats. **The strategy’s key objective** is creating a more efficient and accountable biodefense enterprise. Until now, Federal agencies have had disparate programs that were not centrally coordinated. Today’s Memorandum names Secretary of Health and Human Services Alex Azar as the Federal lead for biodefense and establishes a Cabinet-level Biodefense Steering Committee. **Biological threats know no borders.** Whether naturally occurring, accidental, or deliberate in nature, these risks are among the most serious facing America and its allies. The 2001 anthrax attacks, the 2009 influenza pandemic, the 2014 Ebola epidemic, and the more recent Zika epidemic all reveal the potential for widespread harm and anxiety if such threats are left ignored. “**With these actions today** , I am reaffirming my unwavering commitment to protecting the American people, the American homeland, and the American way of life,” President Trump writes. [**What you should know: How President Trump is strengthening America’s biodefense**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE4Ljk1MDYxODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOC45NTA2MTg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3ODU2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-strengthening-americas-biodefense/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **More** : **[Read the President’s statement on today’s strategy.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE4Ljk1MDYxODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOC45NTA2MTg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3ODU2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/statement-president-national-biodefense-strategy-national-security-presidential-memorandum/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)**
## ‘Critical bipartisan legislation’ on opioids
##
**Yesterday, Congress scored a bipartisan win** in its effort to take on America’s opioid crisis. The Senate passed its Amendment to H.R. 6, the Opioid Crisis Response Act of 2018, which takes a major step toward realizing a whole-of-government approach to combatting drug demand. **President Trump has made the opioid response** a top priority across his Administration.**** Toward that end, this vital legislation would:
* Reduce the amount of illicit fentanyl entering the country
* Improve treatment for infants suffering from neonatal abstinence syndrome
* Create job-training programs for Americans in recovery
* Reauthorize the Office of National Drug Control Policy to continue overseeing Federal drug control efforts, including public awareness campaigns

**“The Administration looks forward** to working with both chambers as the legislative process continues to get a bill to the President’s desk to mitigate this crisis next door,” White House Press Secretary Sarah Sanders said in a statement. **[Read the Press Secretary’s full statement on yesterday’s vote.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE4Ljk1MDYxODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOC45NTA2MTg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3ODU2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/statement-presssecretary-regarding-passage-senate-amendment-h-r-6-opioid-crisis-response-act-2018/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) ** **Go deeper** : [**How the Trump Administration is taking on the “crisis next door”**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE4Ljk1MDYxODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOC45NTA2MTg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3ODU2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/opioids/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Benjamin Tuck
**President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump welcome His Excellency Andrzej Duda, President of the Republic of Poland, and Mrs. Kornhauser-Duda to the White House** | September 18, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE4Ljk1MDYxODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOC45NTA2MTg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3ODU2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE4Ljk1MDYxODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOC45NTA2MTg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3ODU2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE4Ljk1MDYxODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOC45NTA2MTg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3ODU2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Mara Boggs
subject: Grassroots Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
Dear Fellow West Virginian:

With 48 days left until election day, the campaign is in full swing! Joe and the rest of Team Manchin are on the move. We've been hitting parades and festivals all over West Virginia. People are coming out of the woodwork to support Joe's campaign because there is so much at stake in 2018.

We have the momentum. A poll released this week from Emerson College shows Joe with a double digit lead. It's a good sign, but we can't take our foot off the gas.

Morrisey is Dead Wrong

[Watch Joe's latest TV AD. ](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4w3nz3AbA71RcXJPuLNXO3Zp%2bFP6%2by8yB0Vxxw6UoXXfodCKfOAa2RfEfi8lDO5EZDo4ciXKG5eEMOxAUe1rW1nv03YYVrIYDgTJwc%2b1odUArIHoHweGs30%3d)
[](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4w3nz3AbA71RcXJPuLNXO3Zp%2bFP6%2by8yB0Vxxw6UoXXfodCKfOAa2RfEfi8lDO5EZDo4ciXKG5eEMOxAUe1rW1nv03YYVrIYDgTJwc%2b1odUArIHoHweGs30%3d "Click here to watch!")

West Virginians remember when Manchin shot a bullet through the Cap and Trade bill in 2010 because it was bad for the Mountain State. This time, Manchin is taking dead aim at Patrick Morrisey's lawsuit on pre-existing conditions that would hurt 800,000 West Virginians.

In his latest television ad, Manchin blasts Pat Morrisey's lawsuit with a 12-gauge shotgun because the Attorney General's lawsuit is "dead wrong" for West Virginia families.

Seniors Endorsement

The Senior Power PAC announced its endorsement of U.S. Senator Joe Manchin because he's been a reliable advocate for West Virginia's seniors. [See why Joe is the right choice for seniors.](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC49dv5qke%2fMhftpSFNOxGBAvhCBMHWYgZkrga1eiYvgiZR3TRz4SjREQSonQ7U4yXKFZkFf8UtiNxOMm7ksoI40uEY9cRBksJD7s4j2E2s0%2bGfSuiP2SlL11PZeT38qDsUARYVT%2fy8cdX7bJtsKGwaDU%3d)
The West Virginia Directors of Senior and Community Services Senior Power Political Action Committee presents senior centers across the state and its 3,740 employees. The association's members provide services in all 55 counties, including preparing and delivering nearly 2.5 million meals each year. They transport seniors on more than 250,000 trips, which include doctor and medical appointments, transportation to the pharmacy, and to the grocery store.

Watch the endorsement video [here](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4xvlHofxv9cxhDTIKFQ09GzUyvguwKeswftoEMmGQ2ID3VJB1FwRftkCzH3%2bcojt2ShTA8OBknuBlu6gzKUi89eWh%2fXjW2SzpB%2bApPiF%2b0B0Jt%2bj9ZaB43yOFOth6a6FOfUagC5fMkm%2bqshqxFZhyOM%3d).

Debate Update

Patrick Morrisey doesn't have the guts to answer questions from the journalists who know West Virginia best and declined the Wheeliing debate invitation sponsored by local media. Learn more [here](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC42K2HtSUxON14Dvkkrs9VaEUzy%2buLbeVEhwlkmhpVEFgfK1%2fEU7cE3iATd1sLPL%2b6F47U17Tq44LvTSKaowKVGrf4aa26JPPDWb0bJ5wtsyxqPTg9LpPffBH68InJW76skyuK62aFi77xtPB%2fB9X4iNcelNkFQ2D6GVOffbTEDez0AnnVh7oa%2fi73Rc5EcFCW5iXF2mKwqKKU%2f5cv4rY9kScoPv7LT6zHHVDoiHtHmBpm6HVHvsyTqO5vBDJDmIMfwr472PX%2fTeX).

After begging for debates, Morrisey rejected a debate in Wheeling organized by West Virginia's three largest newspaper companies, Ogden Newspapers, NCWV Media and H-D Media.

Manchin [accepted](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC49dv5qke%2fMhftpSFNOxGBAsv2q6MYCr7ur%2bAVX24R6ye98gvQacxinrQf8LUFz2RNbd7NLAo9RY6x9dYfOPG5YA8ZoUqepGgCeMMiZh4ijgBekjBSzTXgGxrf%2fnA%2bDQQtw%3d%3d) the debate invitation for Wheeling last month.

The last thing Morrisey wants to do is answer questions about his record under the bright lights of a debate stage.

Charleston Event

We had a full house in Charleston for our fall kick-off fundraiser! Thank you to all of the supporters who showed up to make the event such a success.

Rally With Educators

This weekend, Joe joined educators at the capitol to support their fight for a better quality of life and a stronger education system. Joe stand with our educators, it's why educators unanimously endorsed Joe Manchin. [A CAN'T MISS VIDEO.](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC49dv5qke%2fMhftpSFNOxGBAv8I8zlZbR%2boNfEz4IuqGYHANvPNXq65zjqfo25SpeQ7qZ9aN6N7DR53tKZSOuWC4TCCoiCjETwpSsv2rJ2n%2bA0IjhzsKc0N4qgUGRgrq7%2bJWlGB4tHVo2M)

Onward,

Mara Boggs
Campaign Manager
Manchin for West Virginia

Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia

P.O. Box 5202
Charleston, WV 25361
[](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC457kkjv9LkTjvDXRuLbXMKT3SLPHL8f66seeqvDN0HKv0yZtvicTJBHji0Rx3fpXm%2fh2PIGbpA56ZmM8ZFXvbp1NGeD8qcDsppJfQufYNAiO%2f3aS9exDIflZMHwnTvHHBfn5rlkvyXkwj%2fULvF7d%2fXWt%2bAPjLyhFboeGGuyO2wP6ky1V2kWxJfPlQji2pc%2fHM61wjOdgm7e5sFCF3QKzGQd0AqLfEeRAXoxIHNz9TEM1iLjGn3JdFtM%3d)

clean_body: Dear Fellow West Virginian: With 48 days left until election day, the campaign is in full swing! Joe and the rest of Team Manchin are on the move. We've been hitting parades and festivals all over West Virginia. People are coming out of the woodwork to support Joe's campaign because there is so much at stake in 2018. We have the momentum. A poll released this week from Emerson College shows Joe with a double digit lead. It's a good sign, but we can't take our foot off the gas. Morrisey is Dead Wrong "Click here to watch!" West Virginians remember when Manchin shot a bullet through the Cap and Trade bill in 2010 because it was bad for the Mountain State. This time, Manchin is taking dead aim at Patrick Morrisey's lawsuit on pre-existing conditions that would hurt 800,000 West Virginians. In his latest television ad, Manchin blasts Pat Morrisey's lawsuit with a 12-gauge shotgun because the Attorney General's lawsuit is "dead wrong" for West Virginia families.
