name: John Shimkus
subject: Our values
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Volunteers for Shimkus
body:
By now you’ve definitely heard talk of what Democrats are calling the “blue wave.” They’re firing up their base and taking to the streets, drumming up
[](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=d61738227e7344acacd657c1e7990eab&_e=u5pn_XBxqBP_YIiIshPiXp8OyMvGbuwwBA5P_67Mxxhf4Ir4MtT5WLiwJJacTrzjEvUbmfDUG8QKShPyLyxODEp9W2GLtOIF-1sA5wit8tY-cBMBrfdG-R5Ry_0buceblF5V1K-4TrvjxAwUo3mONdJpTHlmX6zRB1gmMPf2DWJlu2jJWHnCjwbZx3P08nozAg3Z5BGQog_ec7ZOBfKJENIVLWKcsBdbesS5I5hLynSL85qdKWg5DYY-Wwz5Iz6Eix-XKhdydMQ9by5wm_DUObBgDzLPDmlaMcn7AmkJZK17esSLhStnDQ7pPa_V6nfwUHCxmncPixk8V6h5MN8x5DmGu5HuqnW3QDIxI5pdFtoOpx9aQ1J7fRAau0DTpOmlrRcJtYxhP_WmXJTz49UmRQ%3D%3D)
Friend,

By now you’ve definitely heard talk of what Democrats are calling the “blue wave.” They’re firing up their base and taking to the streets, drumming up support for a takeover of the House of Representatives.

If you ask a Democrat, they’ll tell you that they’ll win by a landslide, reinstall Nancy Pelosi as Speaker, and impose their extreme left-wing agenda onto Americans.

But Friend, if you ask me, I’ll tell you that they’re wrong. The left may be making a lot of noise, but what they lack is our greatest strength: passion for defending our values.
[STAND UP FOR CONSERVATIVE VALUES](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=d61738227e7344acacd657c1e7990eab&_e=u5pn_XBxqBP_YIiIshPiXstNlrG7kg6cp0wyGHy80lL0mKT_tYVcumoD0i-mhofhr_HyryAXAfSLJoJMckpygSyBcGV7SuZv6ksxoxEG6oMJnMvRn6kZSxoavdbOPEHaIODP7aT7xsmJ6uDqpiqNGsDk75g_mG7t4oa4zBQWa8oNg7HJYLgKXpVsl90Z8Ro534C7xv55ZpMB9wWXtASYlVQCX7FtPi7eRWrlLRJRlKcBJoxIT4V9Rlxq7Nz5WYcaD0b830Kjek9DO4WX4NhvMecimOFPuApXg452zX3Pt5SQv35Ub7rSyhb8uUb3ySQfNc2dw4_7bWjq4sMTRv0rgMybBj3CwA8XRCowYC33GmnwnWOmy4Ml_Wvh6dWIqh_qjuS30k7FbuZowZyk057x1h6IyZuJCzZVPl2JXVttC963G6mBnwnFrUWhivivbouE)
---

There’s nothing stronger than Southern Illinois values. We know the importance of hard work, family, and faith. We know how to run our homes, schools, farms, and businesses on our own. We don’t need Washington getting in the way.

That’s why I’m inviting you to stand with me today in defense of the conservative values that we hold dear.
[STAND WITH JOHN](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=d61738227e7344acacd657c1e7990eab&_e=u5pn_XBxqBP_YIiIshPiXstNlrG7kg6cp0wyGHy80lL0mKT_tYVcumoD0i-mhofhr_HyryAXAfSLJoJMckpygSyBcGV7SuZv6ksxoxEG6oMJnMvRn6kZSxoavdbOPEHaIODP7aT7xsmJ6uDqpiqNGsDk75g_mG7t4oa4zBQWa8oNg7HJYLgKXpVsl90Z8Ro534C7xv55ZpMB9wWXtASYlVQCX7FtPi7eRWrlLRJRlKcLPdf_-DSMQzf37S-MeKI3XKOsjjfYrUdHgENpGpS8zPg4VxQRqVjhDCLbBxVIoIFJmTCAIxNN_YG6wE0uDTaPQ4Nye1w1UpdOjQjbdNmGL_ZWRmZr7O1wO9jh2RSSGmBd5nXxJ9XOjDfGgEdEoi_zg1IAnGqWyDTIva0cuMjAYfWTzQxTV9c3V1Dl61MMnoKEZjgbKThivuNEpEzBp2KG)
---

We can’t let the left’s dream of a “blue wave” come true, and we definitely can’t let Nancy Pelosi and her extreme supporters regain control of the House.

Friend, I’m fighting to defend our values every day in Congress. **[I need you to fight with me.](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=d61738227e7344acacd657c1e7990eab&_e=u5pn_XBxqBP_YIiIshPiXstNlrG7kg6cp0wyGHy80lL0mKT_tYVcumoD0i-mhofhr_HyryAXAfSLJoJMckpygSyBcGV7SuZv6ksxoxEG6oMJnMvRn6kZSxoavdbOPEHaIODP7aT7xsmJ6uDqpiqNGsDk75g_mG7t4oa4zBQWa8oNg7HJYLgKXpVsl90Z8Ro534C7xv55ZpMB9wWXtASYlVQCX7FtPi7eRWrlLRJRlKdq-0XqUDTOzgny6lSXfFzSGWThXsgkan4ToDdN7cKq-9-fRF2iIJ1qMNNPHi3p-pXxZrcQBCWtPRnDwiRUR2ShDQIjgaYZFMLenbWC_8aoQ2wGO8YhENfppplYAee4NixS0b3Of8SPjuzKcXM5MZ3FWRKAeIBV7Xk52RYx2ZF4LSRw8t5ghSSBgp4Q8V5Xrjpbctfuxm2AYMbsLPwa7JzT)**

Sincerely,

John

Paid for by Volunteers for Shimkus.
---

[**_After Pennsylvania went red in 2016, we have some serious work to do, and Bob needs your help. Can you donate $5 or more to protect Pennsylvania's only Democratic Senate seat?_**](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180918_fr2_v2s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

I don't need to remind you what happens when we take things for granted -- just look back at 2016. We were poised for victory on all fronts, but we missed an opportunity to send another Democrat to the Senate and let President Trump turn PA red for the first time in almost 20 years. This year, we need to do all we can to prevent that story from repeating itself.

**There are only 49 days left to help Democrats spread their message and make sure we don't have a repeat of 2016 here in PA. What can you give to help send Bob back to the Senate?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180918_fr2_v2s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180918_fr2_v2s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")** **[Donate $50 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180918_fr2_v2s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180918_fr2_v2s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** In solidarity,

Joseph

Joseph Pierce
Political Director
Bob Casey for Senate

| Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.

Bob Casey for Senate appreciates any feedback you might have. [Click here](mailto:info@bobcasey.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact Bob Casey for Senate with any questions, concerns, or ideas. Want to stay updated on the campaign through social media? You can like Bob Casey for Senate on [Facebook](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e62eb/51dbcc2a/1c6225a9/3ab2b8e/651291716/VEsP/ "https://www.facebook.com/BobCaseyJr/") or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e62eb/51dbcc2a/1c6225a9/3ab2b8f/651291716/VEsHBQ/ "https://twitter.com/Bob_Casey") or [Instagram](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e62eb/51dbcc2a/1c6225a9/3ab2b88/651291716/VEsHBA/ "https://www.instagram.com/bobcaseyjr/"). name: Kathy Manning
subject: BIG NEWS -- This race is a toss-up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Sorry for using all caps just then, but this is an all-caps exciting moment: | [](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279a2/e3b7d3/5d43cae7/255546a0/1704025594/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180918?refcode=kme180918_m&recurring=true")
---
**We have big news to share: Nate Silver 's _FiveThirtyEight_ now has our race listed as a TOSS-UP.**
We have the momentum and the drive to win. Now all we need is the resources.
[**With just a few days left until the last FEC Quarter deadline of the election, we're still short of our $65,000 online goal. Can you rush in a contribution?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279a2/e3b7d3/5d43cae7/255546a0/1704025594/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180918?refcode=kme180918_m&recurring=true")
This ratings change is a good sign. But we're not the only ones who can read signs.
Two outside groups backed by the President and Paul Ryan are set to spend big money against us in the final weeks of the campaign. A group backed by the Koch brothers is about to do the same.
**Outside special interest groups will spend whatever they can to keep Rep. Ted Budd fighting for them in the House.** They think an influx of outside, dark money can buy them momentum and a victory in November.
Let's prove them wrong.
[**Give whatever amount you can and help us reach our $65,000 online FEC goal.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279a2/e3b7d3/5d43cae7/255546a0/1704025594/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180918?refcode=kme180918_m&recurring=true")
I'm more fired up than ever before. All of our door knocking, phone banking, registering voters, and talking to people -- is working. I know if we keep at it, we can win in November.
Thank you all for your incredible support.
Kathy

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

name: Bob Hugin for Senate
subject: What They Are Saying!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc
body:
Robert Menendez's political fight for survival | |
---
_**“Bob Hugin is the best Bob in this race and New Jersey voters — Democrats, Independents, and Republicans — know it’s time for change.”**_ \- 9/16/18
|
---
**RIPPED FROM THE HEADLINES**
* New Jersey Globe | Democratic Mayor Backs Hugin
* New Brunswick Today | Admonished by Senate, Embattled Menendez Fights For Survival
* New Jersey Globe | Ex-Dem House candidate endorses Hugin
* Health Leaders | Gov. Rick Scott, Ex-Celgene CEO Among 10 Health Leaders Running in the Midterms
* Five Thirty Eight | Will Democratic Senators Lose Despite The ‘Blue Wave’?
* Save Jersey | #NJSEN: Hugin peels off another Democrat endorsement

**DEMOCRATS CONTINUE TO ABANDON BOB MENENDEZ**
"'Bob Hugin is a refreshing antidote to the type of hyper-partisan, career politicians we have in Washington, D.C. and Trenton, N.J. He is a man of integrity, a person with a pure heart who speaks honestly and directly about what needs to be done in government,' said Mark Dunec of Livingston." (Save Jersey, [**#NJ SEN: Hugin peels off another Democrat endorsement**](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=9cd300bc7e364010bf80c57e5c40e9ea&_e=5rHfJHQzhJQqhxhNE_W1aVVUVu6FLvjj5N4YrPlimw8frIx9926e9zBp6ml--CASlqq__F9ZU_PwVFoPsEFO-AMenI2gjXg6hrGrjY62ysHoFlZibkwN79iBapJqvBU-dbLqBitljvfybhRs44bk9QCcqG9G7Ku5StmDrhMLKQ6eEdkqQgCxfbTPu6T2pkUQLSxHpA1ogSuBq4hFWcbvkBrPO0v20reAC43fqTuA898JPUfkQj0lAYx7azHRcdRhSpMtHhZ6Xn7lTK3x2dII5WbDvu_WQ6uaV9ZUTbqM5EsuUGWANPcmnUrV_ABJTOnQvtr0ErtXnL2Ygd0BorLmAVaSjZ_ECeNWkbmK-fQSqEqVNKrj2-8JVPgxoKSXcbny4DockFC4UB9PpJJ0BxWNvFZXDPkmnkGKxUzuQxYUhsRqoy_k9jNV0_5bRa2Sk3YX), 09/13/18)

"'The high stakes in the New Jersey Senate race are bigger than any political party which is why I’m proudly supporting Bob Hugin for U.S. Senate,' said Frato ... 'Bob Menendez has spent the last 25 years in Washington as an ineffective, corrupt career politician demonstrating time and again that he is only interested in furthering his own interests over the people of our state. New Jersey deserves better.'" (New Jersey Globe, [**Democratic Mayor Backs Hugin**](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=9cd300bc7e364010bf80c57e5c40e9ea&_e=5rHfJHQzhJQqhxhNE_W1aSaca7FabtvzEuWT3v1sRwLTFPnygW46D67czUN7r7mje_dkTqgcu9ArVjSjlE0AE-Eag-PPJaxQSVzE8PjeO-0o2V03hnslnkOtYHnwoocsFL4pj53gkPdOVvrQ7jyBaAIceb2A7mkKQQXOdbdO2d5MC9J-Mlg8vGrvEQJmrJuS-UM7AbzsE6twLO6AuVEsmxszmCDirU2VEqNF-WwDpiMzxeAIiyRKN0fF6owx__YdkW5kIs35wKCvjS_Etglbfn0auBBgWMHbOXIz7eQr128i38w03T5XKulRnVobleQToeli8Xbul-oeQvYVENgUKNAXeVLC7tAuf7RKSL0TnSnSYIDx4l74EmAnkGcGayWe3gumEaLMpXV7wDbpIg777w%3D%3D), 09/18/18)
|

**MENENDEZ ON THE VERGE OF LOSING**
"Hugin’s relentless [...] ad campaign [...] combined with Menendez’s unpopularity among New Jersey voters, are making the race closer than most anticipated." (Politico, [**Robert Menendez’s political fight for survival**](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=9cd300bc7e364010bf80c57e5c40e9ea&_e=5rHfJHQzhJQqhxhNE_W1aVga_mJZm-92_g9dcoMoqSucBadCiMCc64arT9u_2lFcXApfY7nXutAaYBrN_MRSsR2rA78AqBlnkZXONdYryPXK5yvagoR17-aUPreFTu1UbXGS29EOvGBBgQq0mcDO2sJJUxhr1PIzyuqyCQy6IZ4_DLFItHgCWE1eanHa4DpnwVGRhyJSjnAD_QfGgiHERywbmc3L4Tti3tV_N1s6-4XgGsPxn0vDfgVMhAP8fPmxCgIAASdeUyYNmwCYtqQEeaSfDGQx9L6hli_JFeeKWZweaEzhaYVykz8xsEmPJt5CdeXLWn3gj3hb8hfKv9tM0lAyINT5qiPQ_MZoWTZVe6pQ1KnVKAn2sI7IAQLQJHnMk9nUlPs18BHTEiQCbmd9kxyXv_PIvL7hVzbeDJfGtYanvABK6SxWfXQGVbV-pQmC-6taz8YE9-f0hL6Uu-F6gQ%3D%3D), 09/16/18)

| | | I'm going over the latest fundraising numbers, and things just aren't where they should be.

Yesterday, Martin asked for 265 grassroots contributions as we enter the final seven weeks of the campaign. But right now, we're only halfway to our goal.

**If we don 't hit this goal before midnight tonight, I'll have to redo our budget and tell Martin we can't finalize plans for get-out-the-vote programs and advertising buys.** **_[A few dollars can make a big difference -- can you contribute now so we have what it takes to win in November?](http://nm.martinheinrich. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bredesen for Senate
body:
|
#
Peter -- **We’ve just learned that a Super PAC connected to Mitch McConnell and the Washington swamp has launched a new million-dollar negative ad filled with false attacks against Phil Bredesen.** They know that this race is neck-and-neck and that despite the millions they’ve already spent to tear us down, our positive message of getting things done is still resonating with Tennessee voters. But with just weeks left until Election Day, and a recent poll showing 1 in 6 voters might change their mind about who they’re voting for by November, they’re giving everything they’ve got from the DC playbook to try and tear Phil Bredesen down and drag this race into the mud. **That’s why we have to ask:** **Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can to ensure we have everything we need to fight back and cut through the hyper-partisan noise? name: Jessica Morse
subject: how I got here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5_aNrV0L4F2MDxtCy6QbvJyX05P6bfK2hG4Kk234p8g=/HpuoS3EBbHvVMbVFP7WJ4YYYCEgLJdHLgJjTlLRGleI=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180918_JM_20180918-jmbio_all_logo)
Peter: today, it's time to take a step back.
Our new TV ad is on the air, which shares a little about my priorities in Congress, but it's hard to fit the whole picture into a 30-second ad.
You know I'll fight for the community that raised me. **But beyond that --you can trust that I'm tough enough to get the job done by building coalitions in Washington.**
[_**To win in November, we have to reach as many voters as possible --chip in now to help us spread the word.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/5_aNrV0L4F2MDxtCy6QbvJyX05P6bfK2hG4Kk234p8g=/IitfDv1eboRg0Fj1KeVZdwTVDq3QvkXCU6lUVbp5eYc=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180918_JM_20180918-jmbio_all_l1)
_**[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5_aNrV0L4F2MDxtCy6QbvJyX05P6bfK2hG4Kk234p8g=/wQ5dS4ZgMrbssSESoMt7qZmzw92U_m9lgJbj4zrwtw4=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180918_JM_20180918-jmbio_all_i1)**_
**There 's no situation or challenge I'm afraid to take on.** When I served for over a year in Iraq with USAID, I faced gunfire from an Iraqi militia, I saw the aftermath of a chemical weapons attack on a village, and I faced rockets and mortars every day.
But one of my proudest accomplishments came after I discovered that some workers on our military base had been brought to Iraq via human trafficking. I was talking with service workers at the other military bases in Iraq and discovered, to my horror, that most of them were bonded laborers. Human trafficking had gone undetected because U.S. oversight and laws applied only to the first two layers of subcontractors.
I worked with a team to alert the right authorities, including a three-star general who was able to change Pentagon oversight rules and save the workers. Not satisfied with solving merely the immediate problem, after leaving Iraq I worked for the Congressional Commission on Wartime Contracting. We held these subcontractors accountable and changed U.S. laws and oversight rules to ensure that American tax dollars will never pay for human trafficking again.
**I 'll never forget how government actions affect real lives.**
It's been the greatest privilege of my life to serve our country at home and abroad over the course of my career. Now, I'm ready to fight for our community in Congress.
[_**Help me get there --chip in now to help us get our message out.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/5_aNrV0L4F2MDxtCy6QbvJyX05P6bfK2hG4Kk234p8g=/IitfDv1eboRg0Fj1KeVZdwTVDq3QvkXCU6lUVbp5eYc=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180918_JM_20180918-jmbio_all_l2)
Thank you,
Jessica
[CONTRIBUTE ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/5_aNrV0L4F2MDxtCy6QbvJyX05P6bfK2hG4Kk234p8g=/wQ5dS4ZgMrbssSESoMt7qZmzw92U_m9lgJbj4zrwtw4=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180918_JM_20180918-jmbio_all_contribbutton)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Courtland=20Sykes?=
subject: Dems Attack Kavanaugh, No Evidence - Meanwhile, Dems Defend Illegals Abusing Young Girls Daily
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COURTLAND SYKES FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---
| | | **Peter,**

Democrats are accusing Judge Brett Kavanaugh of sexual assault so they can keep a strong Conservative judge from the Supreme Court. Brett Kavanaugh is a man of stellar character and a known, impeccable record. They are accusing him and they don't have a shred of evidence to back their claims.
---
|
---
Today's headline on New York Times. Not a shred of evidence has been offered to back claims of decades old sexual assault claims.
| Meanwhile, these same Democrats are doing everything they can to ensure illegal immigrants get "sanctuary," amnesty, and voting rights.

**To illustrate the absurdity of what has been going on all week, I present to you just three of the dozens of examples from the last few weeks alone that have gone unnoticed by the liberals who are too busy attacking a judge loved by all who know him.**

**Meet Antonio Ramirez Lopez. **
This man is charged with sexually and physically assaulting a 10 year old little girl in Kentucky 3 days ago.
This man should not have been here.

He is an illegal immigrant from Mexico.

ICE wants to deport him permanently. Liberals will argue we should give him amnesty.
**Meet Joel Callejas Cantor. **
This man is charged with sexually assaulting a 7 year old little girl in North Carolina two months ago. This man should not have been here. He is an illegal from Mexico. In court, he asked the judge to just send him back to Mexico so he didn't have to be prosecuted.

ICE wants to deport him permanently. Liberals will argue we should give him amnesty.
**Meet Udiel Aguilar-Castellanos. **
This man is charged with sexually assaulting an 11 year old little girl in North Carolina two months ago.

This man should not have been here. He is an illegal from Mexico. ICE recommended deportation months ago. No one did anything about it.

_ICE wants to deport him permanently. Liberals will argue we should give him amnesty._

**These three cases are one of DOZENS that have happened across the country in the last few weeks alone.**

Crossing our borders illegally, these men have essentially broken into our homes and in doing so, have assaulted our children. Open Borders Democrats and their sanctuary cities might as well have been cheering them on in the act.

These heinous crimes against innocent children could have been perpetrated by any number of thugs -- citizens or not. But this doesn't mean we shouldn't do everything in our power to prevent those that could have been prevented. **The lives of these young girls have been forever affected. We must support these girls by showing them that justice can and will ultimately be served. **

__We could have prevented these crimes by building the wall, enforcing the law, and supporting ICE.__ As the November elections are upon us, we must ensure that we hold our elected officials to the fire on these issues because Liberals are fighting tooth and nail to grant protection, support, taxpayer dollars, and resources for "sanctuary cities" to "protect" illegal immigrants like these criminals from ICE and deportation.
Nancy Pelosi wants MORE men like this to become voters, to overturn Republican control, and continue to allow a wide open southern border with Mexico so that she and the Democrats ensure Republicans never get elected ever again.

I'm not going to the Senate or to Washington as your elected official this year, but I am on the warpath against the liberal agenda supporting the criminals I have just highlighted.
---
| |
---
I have exciting news to share with you in the coming weeks regarding my role in fighting for the cause of protecting our borders and shutting down illegal immigration. I hope that you will join me for this next phase.

As I close out my election committee and open the next chapter of my political advocacy, [I ask that you join me,](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=e4cc88d2e3&e=9da9b0ca31) help me further the cause and open this next chapter with the fury and the passion that it requires. Courtland Sykes
---
